rag_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex; otherwise remove the guarantee
Align helper declaration types with the expression types
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for const and eq declarations
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators such as and, or, not(...), and implication =>
generic_rules: Trace the first unresolved identifier or invalid helper declaration on the same line
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for const and eq declarations
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators such as and, or, not(...), and implication =>
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for const and eq declarations
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators such as and, or, not(...), and implication =>
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references that are absent from the analyzed model and its configured dependencies
Do not use subcomponent ports in a component type contract unless represented through valid variables or outputs
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
